prerequisites: A Productboard workspace on the Pro plan or higher. API access tokens are not available on the Essentials plan.
Permission to open Settings -> Integrations -> Public APIs in your Productboard workspace so you can generate an access token.
A Public API Access Token created from your workspace (provided via the access_token field).
A start date to bound the sync; records created or updated on or after this date are pulled (provided via the start_date field).

authMethods.name: API access token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Productboard Public API Access Token (a personal access token). The token is sent on every request as an Authorization: Bearer <token> header against the v2 API base URL https://api.productboard.com/v2. Maps to the connector's access_token secret field.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your plan
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Productboard at https://www.productboard.com and confirm your workspace is on the Pro plan or higher. Public API access tokens are not offered on the Essentials plan.

setupSteps.title: Open the token settings
setupSteps.body: In your Productboard workspace, navigate to Settings -> Integrations -> Public APIs -> Access Token. If this option is not visible, your workspace plan does not include API tokens.

setupSteps.title: Create and copy an access token
setupSteps.body: Click the plus (+) icon to generate a new token. Copy and store it securely immediately, because this is the only time the full token is shown. You can revoke unused or compromised tokens later from Workspace Settings.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access token
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token into the connector's access_token field. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer <token> header on every request to https://api.productboard.com/v2.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the start_date field to the earliest date from which data should be synced. The connector uses this value as the cutoff for the initial extraction.
